title: Club Penguin Music Discs
description: Listen to Club Penguin songs through Minecraft music discs! 📀
body:
## 📀 Listen to your favorite Club Penguin tunes in Minecraft!
► This resource pack adds **Club Penguin** songs into Minecraft via the music discs.

![Discsprites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8067e96685f9ee05089fbba4f42734def8be1896.png)

**■** All music discs change their sprite and name to match every song!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OAROks-M7eg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<details>
<summary>🎧 Tracklist</summary>

- _**Norrie Henderson - [Through Mountain Passes](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IfYL0YLWCig) (Snow Dojo)**_
- _**Paul Sumpter - [King of Kingston](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L-im4pRBVlc) (Coffee Shop)**_
- _**Candence - [The Party Starts Now](https://youtu.be/i8RDVTW2i4U?si=BY288FVydRXPDNOj) (Instrumental)**_
- _**Norrie Henderson - [Tusk](https://youtu.be/111ggEhUSIU?si=xrF3TbdEFbxPob38)**_
- _**Chris Hendricks - [Rollerscape](https://youtu.be/OT9YVC_PHZo?si=hZq24dKuuq5LV_XC) (Pufflescape)**_
- _**Jeremy Sherman - [Paris St. Germain](https://youtu.be/dhKAcYPWonE?si=fkNO5JkIgCYdsgMl) (Ice Fishing)**_
- _**Bart Roijmans - [Gary's Theme](https://youtu.be/MjuIZeIXXvI?si=KXt4gmU7A414JJ3H) (Gadget Room)**_
- _**Chris Hendricks - [Pizzatron 3000](https://youtu.be/LEZg_5PcUKI?si=cJ2ag1ASnnnDhJHW)**_
- _**Norrie Henderson - [Operation Blackout](https://youtu.be/LBPOn3-vrnE?si=FdO1b62L3_P0Crqq)**_
- _**Skip Peck - [Charlie's Here](https://youtu.be/rqnpacsOQAQ?si=yb-g4hCVqAFST5Sy) (Pizza Parlor)**_
- _**Chris Hendricks - [Mountain Dojo](https://youtu.be/rCyou4Cz3J0?si=ThhdhUCFxE0Mqnhy) (Dojo)**_
- _**Danny Brown - [Maximun Wave](https://youtu.be/rV0rjUWGysA?si=gIEF5Gw_px05XbbY) (Cart Surfer)**_
- _**The Penguin Band - [Ghost Just Wanna Dance](https://youtu.be/3eMt_TANMkE?si=BQEY6nOuSkFC99JE) (Instrumental)**_
- _**Chris Hendricks - [Ramp It Up!](https://youtu.be/G6WuZkYdg5w?si=hVs0gZdMqZWFhGxP) (Puffle Launch)**_
- _**Jane Finstrom - [Paparazzi](https://youtu.be/hqnvunVQ6UI?si=SeKoc7wQNmYbqqb7) (Tutorial)**_
- _**Paul Sumpter - [Sparky's New Bike](https://youtu.be/n57NnBmKTns?si=KM8FIS2i1Ey8GhkX) (April Fools Party)**_
- _**Norrie Henderson - [Herbert Style](https://youtu.be/4qvUVaxmMfM?si=I6v__9ItJqwOdR3K)**_
- _**Chris Hendricks - [Elite Penguin Force](https://youtu.be/Fs43CFTDxrM?si=CylPe-xkhcva71dC) (EPF Command Room)**_
- _**Bjorn Lynne - [Crossing Over](https://youtu.be/qHru2E7bPR4?si=nst54YfgK3D-MPfR) (Dance Mix 2)**_
- _**Norrie Henderson - [What Lurks In The Night](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tpJY4QvrG2M)**_

</details>


<details>
<summary>🌍 Supported Languages</summary>

- English (US)
- English (Australia)
- English (Canada)
- English (United Kingdom)
- English (New Zealand)
- Pirate Speak
- Español (España)
- Español (México)
- Español (Argentina)
- Español (Chile)
- Español (Ecuador)
- Español (Venezuela)
- Português (Brasil)
- Português (Portugal)

</details>


<details>
<summary>🔄 Replaced Discs</summary>

- 11 ➡️ Through Mountain Passes
- Mellohi ➡️ The Party Starts Now
- Stal ➡️ Rollerscape
- Pigstep ➡️ Tusk
- Far ➡️ Paris St. Germain
- Creator ➡️ Gary's Theme
- Creator (Music Box) ➡️ King of Kingston
- 13 ➡️ Pizzatron 3000
- 5 ➡️ Operation Blackout
- Cat ➡️ Charlie's Here
- Chirp ➡️ Mountain Dojo
- Strad ➡️ Maximum Wave
- Otherside ➡️ Ghost Just Wanna Dance
- Mall ➡️ Ramp It Up!
- Relic ➡️ Paparazzi
- Wait ➡️ Sparky's New Bike
- Ward ➡️ Herbert Style
- Precipice ➡️ Elite Penguin Force
- Blocks ➡️ Crossing Over
- Tears ➡️ What Lurks In The Night

</details>
